chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 3306 of 2016 Present:- Mr. Justice Nadeem Akhtar Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Date of hearing: & decision: 05.11.2019 Petitioner: Muhammad Amir through Mr. Fakhruddin Dahraj, Advocate, who is called absent. Respondents: Province of Sindh and others through Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. ORDER ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J:- Petitioner through the instant petition is seeking appointment on ministerial posts on deceased quota in Agriculture Department, Government of Sindh, in terms of Rule 11-A of Sindh Civil Servant (Appointment Promotion and Transfer) Rules, 1974. At the very outset, learned A.A.G. has placed on record a copy of letter dated 30.10.2019 with the assertion that petitioner Muhammad Aamir has already been appointed as Boring Helper BPS-1 against deceased quota vide office order dated 29.6.2017 and seeks disposal of the petition accordingly. We are surprised rather shocked to know the aforesaid factum as in the intervening period nobody on behalf of the parties bothered to intimate this Court regarding appointment of the petitioner in the year 2017 and the matter is being lingering on unnecessarily. We take serious view of the above and do not appreciate the conduct of the parties. In view of the above, this petition having served its purpose is dismissed with cost of Rs.5000 to be borne by both the parties equally and the same shall be deposited with the Additional Registrar of this Court for Court’s Dispensary Fund, within a period of one week from the receipt of this order. JUDGE JUDGE Karar_hussain/PS*
